use_cases: Cycling through featured images on landing pages with automatic interval-based playback
Displaying product image galleries in e-commerce with loop or single-pass modes
Creating hero section image rotators with configurable transition timing
Building media galleries that auto-advance through image collections
Implementing news ticker-style image feeds with completion callbacks
ai_summary: A lightweight React image slideshow component that automatically cycles through an array of images at configurable intervals. Supports looping, one-shot playback with onComplete callback, and custom image rendering via renderImage prop. The component resets to first image when the images array changes and handles edge cases like empty arrays. Designed as a reusable atomic component for any application needing timed image rotation.
